name: Family Bingo - Gigglescape™: Kids Classic Game, Includes Boards & Game Pieces, 1-6 Players, Ages 3+, Creative Thinking
description:
Help your little one learn numbers, words and letters during playtime with Family Bingo from Gigglescape™. This family-friendly bingo set features four ways to play with classic bingo, sight words, animal icons and alphabet letters. Twelve double-sided bingo cards, 160 marker chips and 152 bingo tokens provide everything they need to play by themselves or with family and friends. Suitable for a mix of skill levels, this bingo game is made for one to six players and includes four storage bags for easy cleanup.

Gigglescape™: Where play starts and discovery never ends.
